documents.title: Launch
documents.content: AlphaOps launches a groundbreaking platform for modern teams.

incorrect_response_example: AlphaOps targets enterprise operations teams and offers usage-based pricing.
why_model_fails: The model over-generalizes from vague language and fabricates segment/pricing signals.

documents.title: SMB update
documents.content: SMB package starts at $29 per seat.

incorrect_response_example: BetaCloud pricing starts at $29 per seat.
why_model_fails: The model silently picks one source instead of preserving attribution and surfacing conflict.

documents.title: Vision
documents.content: GammaHealth is the future of care with revolutionary impact and world-class outcomes.

incorrect_response_example: GammaHealth differentiates through Epic integration and lower total cost.
why_model_fails: The model hallucinates factual differentiators from purely promotional language.

documents.title: Capabilities
documents.content: Real-time scoring is available only on Enterprise.

incorrect_response_example: Real-time scoring is available on all plans.
why_model_fails: The model merges contradictory claims into a confident but unsupported conclusion.

documents.title: Story
documents.content: Long marketing narrative... many slogans... one factual line: 'contact sales for pricing'.

incorrect_response_example: EpsilonPay offers transparent tiered pricing and serves SMB merchants.
why_model_fails: Signal-to-noise imbalance causes the model to infer unsupported pricing structure and segment.
